name: Perf and Observability Design
when_to_use: Designing instrumentation, SLOs, tracing topology, or latency budgets up-front for a new or expanding system

name: Optimize Known-Slow Path
when_to_use: Profile-first sequencing of safe improvements to a known-slow operation, with before / after measurement gates

name: Program-Level Strategy
when_to_use: Cross-surface observability roadmap, SLO / error-budget program design, instrumentation budget across logs / metrics / traces
